WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About > History
WebContent.Content:
Locale History

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

FIRST WORSHIP SERVICE
On December 16, 2000, the Members of the Church of God in Christ Jesus, the Pillar and Ground of the Truth (Now, registered as “Members Church of God International” in the Phillipines), in Singapore held its first Worship Service at Commonwealth (near MRT station).

This foreign chapter was commenced by four brethrens- Bro. John Alcaras and his wife Sis Agnes Alcaras, Bro. Noli Falcis, and Sis Mary Jo Maleriado.

During that time, the assemblage was held in Bro. John's residence with the use of transcription for the Prayer Meeting and Worship Service. Thanksgiving were monitored thru cassette tapes and VHS. But even before the first church service was on its inception, bible study then was conducted by sis Mary Jo to bro Rex Fonacier  and his housemates, who was not a member then. That became a channel to spread the word of God in this City State.

FRUIT OF PROPAGATION
With the resolute effort exerted by every member with the help of God in this locale, six souls underwent indoctrination on June 2001. They all started watching the Church's program (Ang Dating Daan or The Old Path) in SBN 21, until they found themselves lightheartedly attending the indoctrination via VHS tape. Fruitfully, before nightfall of July 26, 2001, first membership took place. It was Bro Resty Reyes, on OIC then who baptized the first batch of harvested-soul. Bro Rex was part of this first set and to name a few are Bro Cesar Dacigo, Sis Yang Valdez and Bro Rene Barnido.

To further support brethren and visitors, workers were sent. Bro Melvin Arbo followed by Bro Mel Lingat move in to Singapore. They conducted live indoctrinations and Bible study. Due to intricacy issue on entry permit, assigned regular workers alternately move in and out every three months. Bro. Fred Lao, Bro. Mark Barroga, Bro. Juan Ferreria, Bro. Jun Gundayao, Bro. Ramil Ramal, and Bro. Mel Lingat were some of the workers who came in to do their duty.

However, those difficulties never deterred on their evangelical mission. On October 12, 2001, four nurses from Lion's Home for the Elders were baptized. Those pious sisters are Sis Ada, Sis Agnes, Sis Alice and Sis Zeny.  On year 2002, another soul had cheerfully given thanks to the Lord for His unspeakable gifts.

With the exceeding grace of God, Bro Romy and Sis Rebecca were baptized. Also, followed by, Sis Nita, Bro Rene and wife Sis Loreta, Sis Ledda, Bro Hector, and Sis Eugene on July of the same year.

In February of 2003, Sis Ruth Soriano remotely conducted the first English-indoctrination via the internet to our Singaporean Brother William.

LOCALE - AS IT GROWS…
On December 2001, the locale was transferred to a bigger location at Choa Chu Kang. Prayer meeting had been set every 8:00pm of Wednesday evening, whereas, Worship Service and Thanksgiving were scheduled every Sunday at 9:30 in the morning. Despite being far from the city, the remoteness did not deter an inch for brethren to congregate and attend the church services. To the brethren’s surprise, Bro Daniel Razon’s first-visit to brethren in Singapore also took place in this malay-owned-residential-unit. The same locale where the first Thanksgiving via a phone-hook-up in Apalit came to a reality. It was then followed by the First Bible Exposition in Cuppage Plaza wherein bro Eli, for the first, answered all the questions in English over the entire bible exposition, via phone-patched.

With God’s mercy and help, the number of brethren continuously grows. The locale transferred again to a new location at #9 Saint Thomas Walk. This semi-province-type walk-up unit in the midst of posh River Valley road had been, once again a fruitful place for God’s calling. During the height of Grand Worldwide Bible Exposition, Singapore was always on the list for those that participated in this Global Event.

Two years passed, locale was once again relocated on a two-storey apartment behind the newly constructed North-East MRT line in Potong Pasir at #33 Pheng Geck Avenue. During that time, there were approximately 30 souls registered. This locale may had not surpassed the number of baptized souls relative to previous venues of services, but in this semi-detached unit, gave birth the many “First” that Locale of Singapore had experienced beyond hoped for. Remember the first part of Thanksgiving emanated abroad by our “Kuya”? Beyond our prayers, God showered His blessings when our next-day bible exposition caused tearful-ovation when Bro Eli himself meekly walked his way towards the stage to introduce himself to an audience of foreign land. A jubilation indeed but did not hastily end because right after that day,  the first run of Bible Expo carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America. Maybe, not so much of a first, but those were all further than wished and dreamt as members.

After several years, brethren from other country travel here in Singapore to work and to find a greener pasture. Then, locale move to a place on where brethren can extend their mission. It is now situated at River Valley which is in the central part of Singapore.
 

HEAR THE GOOD NEWS
With its mission to propagate the true gospel of Christ based on the bible, the first Bible Exposition was held on July 13, 2002. This three-hour English format event, hosted by the only sensible evangelist in our times, had given chance to those people who zealously seeking the true Church written in the bible. This also intensified people's knowledge about the truth in the bible. During the event, people heard and witnessed how Brother Eli indomitably answered the questions of our truth-deprived fellowmen.

On November 14, 2002, the Grand Bible Exposition was then became a much awaited big event during that time in Singapore. The venue of it is at YWCA. Expectedly, all questions have been answered based on the bible.

Another awe-inspiring event happens when locale of Singapore hosted a”Grand Pulong”  in Qatar and Isabela and was aired in the Philippines on November 15, 2004. The event was concurrently happen with the test broadcast of Globecast to North America and Canada.
 

REGISTERED RELIGIOUS SOCIETY IN SINGAPORE
On April 10 2002, Singapore government approved the application and registered the group as a religious society under the name Members of Church of God in Christ Jesus, Pillar and Ground of truth, Singapore. Bro Aga Caacbay and Bro Jun Gundayao went to Singapore on January 2, 2005, to further assist brethren and guests, and to propagate the Word of God written in the Bible. After several months, work permit was given on them to perform as worker and preacher.
 

ADVANCEMENT
Church of God in Singapore signed an agreement and made a tie up with Expan on August 8, 2003, under Asia's number one telecommunication company, SINGTEL. This is to install an Internet Server in Singapore to receive and distribute broadcasts coming from the Apalit, Philippines. Up to date, live and taped broadcasts and websites are still available for public viewing. It also allows brethren to monitor the Thanksgiving proceedings and even conventions.

International Thanksgiving was emanated abroad, when Bro Daniel Razon came to Singapore on November 13, 2004.

On October 7, 2004, Globecast which is situated in Temasek, made an agreement to carry the TOP channel Direct-to-Home broadcast in North America and Canada.
With the latest innovations, the word of God continued to spread around the globe. It now reached the large audience that allows everyone to hear the pure and true Gospel of God in the bible.


YEAR 2008
The locale is still in Rivervalley, but the hunt of finding the God-given venue of brethrens assemblage remains impervious. A place to gather more than 200 souls every International ThanksGiving and Bible Exposition.

From its cradle, this locale undauntedly delivers services for the brethren and fellowman. With Gods help, committees were established for singing, dancing, broadcasting, propagating and looking after for the welfare of brethren, guest and even to our countryman thru external activities like Bloodletting.

Next to Dubai, brethren of Singapore joined hand to etch another list in our history when the broadcast of Good Morning Kuya goes to Singapore on 29th September – 3rd Oct 2008 transpired. It was maybe a spur-of-the-moment gathering of effort and resources but because of God’s help, MCGI brethren managed to pull off such event, which aims to be always a public service program.

Now, Locale of Singapore continues to increase in numbers and services for the brethren and to our fellow. With God’s help more will come to reality.

This locale will remain hand in hand with the same ideals and vision of our leaders. Bro Daniel and Bro Eli. Global Evangelization of God’s saving power, grace and His Love since the beginning and beyond everlasting.

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About > Mission
WebContent.Content:
Mission & Discipline

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Believing that one of the most important missions of the members of the Church of God International is to propagate the pure and untarnished Gospel of Christ on earth, the Church has conscientiously and fervently carries this obligation to fellowmen all over the world through the use of mass media and the Internet.

It is fully aware that this effort is geared to convert sinners to believe and glorify God, who is calling His people with determination to serve Him, bringing them in His fold, teaching them righteousness and to make them qualify for life eternal in heaven. (I Corinthians 1:9,2; Ephesians 4:1,10,14; Acts 2:38; Philippians 1:27; I Peter 1:15-16; Ephesians 2:10; I Thessalonians 1:1)

As a member of the Church, one is taught to follow religiously and conscientiously the fundamental doctrines for Christians and righteousness as a way of life, and to be law abiding citizens recognizing the fundamental laws of the land they live in. (Ephesians 2:12-13; Acts 26:18; 14:15; 17:29; Rome 13: 1-7; I Pet. 2:13; Proverb 8:15-16)

The Almighty God, the Father, is believed by its members to be the Creator of the universe, and that Christ Jesus is the Father’s only begotten son, a true and Mighty God, the only savior of mankind and the only way to the Kingdom of God in heaven. (Acts 14:15; I Corinthians 8:5-7; John 14:6, 14:1)

It believes that the Philippines is part of the Gentile nations, which is partakers of the promise—the eternal life—through belief in Christ Jesus and the Gospel. As such, it believe that it is not authorized by God to establish their own Church, but are mere members associated with the same body or Church written in the Gospel by accepting and executing the doctrines written by the Apostles. (Ephesians 3:6; Colossians 1:18; I John 2:25; 1:3-4; I Corinthians 12:27; Psalm 127:1; I Timothy 3:15)

The duty and obligation of the members of the Church to propagate the Gospel of Christ shall be undertaken until the consummation of the ages, for only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind. (Luke 8:1-3; Ephesians. 3:10; II Timothy 3:14-17 )

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Known to be highly principled and incomparable in upholding God's righteousness, the Church, formerly known as the CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF THE TRUTH is now known as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL. The late Nicolas Antiporda Perez, Ka Perez, was the first leader of this group.

When Nicolas Perez died in 1975, Eliseo Soriano Y Fernando pacified a group of believers whose spirits were dampened by the unexpected death of their leader. Although there existed no appointed official successor, Eliseo Soriano nurtured the flock and kept it intact. He taught them that the death of leader does not mean the disintegration of the church. Driven by extreme greed for power, his former colleagues embarked on dark schemes against him and launched an underground plot to malign and discredit Eliseo Soriano before the members.

Seeing this, Eliseo Soriano, together with a few hundred, immediately left the group. In 1980, they registered as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF TRUTH, PHILIPPINES, appointing Eliseo Soriano as Presiding Minister. With this development, a prophecy in the Book of Zachariah was realized (Zach. 13:8-9). While the organization headed by Eliseo Soriano progressed and grew, the other two organizations diminished in number, with vague and obscure doctrines.

Among the three groups, Eliseo Soriano's group became known for upholding the “former” things—of the things in the past. It became known for rendering obedience to God in the same way the first of God's people obeyed Him truthfully. The attributes of the real city of God continued to live in this organization: firm in its stand and fearless in upholding the truth. This group continues to propagate God's teachings worldwide – despite the negative concerted efforts and harassment from its religious foes and the government.

In the eyes of men and God, this group remains to bear a seal, a seal that is impressed in the hearts and minds of the people. In these last days, there remains an organization that is worthy of the people's trust—an organization better known as “THE OLD PATH.”

Member Area - Singapore Chapter

WebContent.Title: Locale Information
WebContent.Content:
Locale Information

The fervent objective of the radio and television program is maintained in our online media format. It upholds the divine mission to propagate the true Gospel of Christ based on the Bible and converts sinners to believe and glorify God. It also believes that only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind.

Our website features timely and relevant Bible Expositions and public discussions, television segments, exposés, the highly-popular Itanong mo kay Soriano (Ask Soriano) segment, religious references, and doctrines, among others.

When launched in 2000, the MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL made a bold step in reaching out to many people worldwide, together with the streaming media platform called www.theoldpath.tv .

Since then, “Ang Dating Daan” was heard and seen in the whole world. Membership soared and new local chapters were established in North America, Canada, Europe, Africa, and even the Asia Pacific, China and Australia.

In 2002, our website made history when the 5th Philippine Web Awards picked out Ang Dating Daan Bible Exposition Online for the Yehey's MOST POPULAR WEBSITE and the PEOPLE’S CHOICE AWARD in the BEST ORGANIZATION CATEGORY. Over 2,000 Philippine websites vied for the top site in this annual website competition.

On the other hand, “Ang Dating Daan,” which already carved its mark since its inception over 20 years ago in Philippine broadcast history, can be seen worldwide via satellite through the facilities of UN Television UHF Channel 37 and heard over the most powerful radio networks – DZRH, RMN and 100 Radyo Nation Stations nationwide.

Brother Eliseo F. Soriano, considered as the only sensible evangelist today, hosts the radio and television programs, together with Bros. Josel Mallari, Danny Navales, Willy Santiago and Sis. Luz Cruz.

The Ang Dating Daan Bible Exposition Online, with satellite offices all over the country and several countries around the globe, can be contacted in its central headquarters in ADD Convention Center, Brgy. Sampaloc, Apalit, Pampanga.

WebContent.Title: Locale Information
WebContent.Content:
$(Page:Name)Locale Information

The fervent objective of the radio and television program is maintained in our online media format. It upholds the divine mission to propagate the true Gospel of Christ based on the Bible and converts sinners to believe and glorify God. It also believes that only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind.

Our website features timely and relevant Bible Expositions and public discussions, television segments, exposés, the highly-popular Itanong mo kay Soriano (Ask Soriano) segment, religious references, and doctrines, among others.

When launched in 2000, the MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL made a bold step in reaching out to many people worldwide, together with the streaming media platform called www.theoldpath.tv .

Since then, “Ang Dating Daan” was heard and seen in the whole world. Membership soared and new local chapters were established in North America, Canada, Europe, Africa, and even the Asia Pacific, China and Australia.

In 2002, our website made history when the 5th Philippine Web Awards picked out Ang Dating Daan Bible Exposition Online for the Yehey's MOST POPULAR WEBSITE and the PEOPLE’S CHOICE AWARD in the BEST ORGANIZATION CATEGORY. Over 2,000 Philippine websites vied for the top site in this annual website competition.

On the other hand, “Ang Dating Daan,” which already carved its mark since its inception over 20 years ago in Philippine broadcast history, can be seen worldwide via satellite through the facilities of UN Television UHF Channel 37 and heard over the most powerful radio networks – DZRH, RMN and 100 Radyo Nation Stations nationwide.

Brother Eliseo F. Soriano, considered as the only sensible evangelist today, hosts the radio and television programs, together with Bros. Josel Mallari, Danny Navales, Willy Santiago and Sis. Luz Cruz.

The Ang Dating Daan Bible Exposition Online, with satellite offices all over the country and several countries around the globe, can be contacted in its central headquarters in ADD Convention Center, Brgy. Sampaloc, Apalit, Pampanga.

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About > History
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

FIRST WORSHIP SERVICE
On December 16, 2000, the Members of the Church of God in Christ Jesus, the Pillar and Ground of the Truth (Now, registered as “Members Church of God International” in the Phillipines), in Singapore held its first Worship Service at Commonwealth (near MRT station).

This foreign chapter was commenced by four brethrens- Bro. John Alcaras and his wife Sis Agnes Alcaras, Bro. Noli Falcis, and Sis Mary Jo Maleriado.

During that time, the assemblage was held in Bro. John's residence with the use of transcription for the Prayer Meeting and Worship Service. Thanksgiving were monitored thru cassette tapes and VHS. But even before the first church service was on its inception, bible study then was conducted by sis Mary Jo to bro Rex Fonacier  and his housemates, who was not a member then. That became a channel to spread the word of God in this City State.

FRUIT OF PROPAGATION
With the resolute effort exerted by every member with the help of God in this locale, six souls underwent indoctrination on June 2001. They all started watching the Church's program (Ang Dating Daan or The Old Path) in SBN 21, until they found themselves lightheartedly attending the indoctrination via VHS tape. Fruitfully, before nightfall of July 26, 2001, first membership took place. It was Bro Resty Reyes, on OIC then who baptized the first batch of harvested-soul. Bro Rex was part of this first set and to name a few are Bro Cesar Dacigo, Sis Yang Valdez and Bro Rene Barnido.

To further support brethren and visitors, workers were sent. Bro Melvin Arbo followed by Bro Mel Lingat move in to Singapore. They conducted live indoctrinations and Bible study. Due to intricacy issue on entry permit, assigned regular workers alternately move in and out every three months. Bro. Fred Lao, Bro. Mark Barroga, Bro. Juan Ferreria, Bro. Jun Gundayao, Bro. Ramil Ramal, and Bro. Mel Lingat were some of the workers who came in to do their duty.

However, those difficulties never deterred on their evangelical mission. On October 12, 2001, four nurses from Lion's Home for the Elders were baptized. Those pious sisters are Sis Ada, Sis Agnes, Sis Alice and Sis Zeny.  On year 2002, another soul had cheerfully given thanks to the Lord for His unspeakable gifts.

With the exceeding grace of God, Bro Romy and Sis Rebecca were baptized. Also, followed by, Sis Nita, Bro Rene and wife Sis Loreta, Sis Ledda, Bro Hector, and Sis Eugene on July of the same year.

In February of 2003, Sis Ruth Soriano remotely conducted the first English-indoctrination via the internet to our Singaporean Brother William.

LOCALE - AS IT GROWS…
On December 2001, the locale was transferred to a bigger location at Choa Chu Kang. Prayer meeting had been set every 8:00pm of Wednesday evening, whereas, Worship Service and Thanksgiving were scheduled every Sunday at 9:30 in the morning. Despite being far from the city, the remoteness did not deter an inch for brethren to congregate and attend the church services. To the brethren’s surprise, Bro Daniel Razon’s first-visit to brethren in Singapore also took place in this malay-owned-residential-unit. The same locale where the first Thanksgiving via a phone-hook-up in Apalit came to a reality. It was then followed by the First Bible Exposition in Cuppage Plaza wherein bro Eli, for the first, answered all the questions in English over the entire bible exposition, via phone-patched.

With God’s mercy and help, the number of brethren continuously grows. The locale transferred again to a new location at #9 Saint Thomas Walk. This semi-province-type walk-up unit in the midst of posh River Valley road had been, once again a fruitful place for God’s calling. During the height of Grand Worldwide Bible Exposition, Singapore was always on the list for those that participated in this Global Event.

Two years passed, locale was once again relocated on a two-storey apartment behind the newly constructed North-East MRT line in Potong Pasir at #33 Pheng Geck Avenue. During that time, there were approximately 30 souls registered. This locale may had not surpassed the number of baptized souls relative to previous venues of services, but in this semi-detached unit, gave birth the many “First” that Locale of Singapore had experienced beyond hoped for. Remember the first part of Thanksgiving emanated abroad by our “Kuya”? Beyond our prayers, God showered His blessings when our next-day bible exposition caused tearful-ovation when Bro Eli himself meekly walked his way towards the stage to introduce himself to an audience of foreign land. A jubilation indeed but did not hastily end because right after that day,  the first run of Bible Expo carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America. Maybe, not so much of a first, but those were all further than wished and dreamt as members.

After several years, brethren from other country travel here in Singapore to work and to find a greener pasture. Then, locale move to a place on where brethren can extend their mission. It is now situated at River Valley which is in the central part of Singapore.
 

HEAR THE GOOD NEWS
With its mission to propagate the true gospel of Christ based on the bible, the first Bible Exposition was held on July 13, 2002. This three-hour English format event, hosted by the only sensible evangelist in our times, had given chance to those people who zealously seeking the true Church written in the bible. This also intensified people's knowledge about the truth in the bible. During the event, people heard and witnessed how Brother Eli indomitably answered the questions of our truth-deprived fellowmen.

On November 14, 2002, the Grand Bible Exposition was then became a much awaited big event during that time in Singapore. The venue of it is at YWCA. Expectedly, all questions have been answered based on the bible.

Another awe-inspiring event happens when locale of Singapore hosted a”Grand Pulong”  in Qatar and Isabela and was aired in the Philippines on November 15, 2004. The event was concurrently happen with the test broadcast of Globecast to North America and Canada.
 

REGISTERED RELIGIOUS SOCIETY IN SINGAPORE
On April 10 2002, Singapore government approved the application and registered the group as a religious society under the name Members of Church of God in Christ Jesus, Pillar and Ground of truth, Singapore. Bro Aga Caacbay and Bro Jun Gundayao went to Singapore on January 2, 2005, to further assist brethren and guests, and to propagate the Word of God written in the Bible. After several months, work permit was given on them to perform as worker and preacher.
 

ADVANCEMENT
Church of God in Singapore signed an agreement and made a tie up with Expan on August 8, 2003, under Asia's number one telecommunication company, SINGTEL. This is to install an Internet Server in Singapore to receive and distribute broadcasts coming from the Apalit, Philippines. Up to date, live and taped broadcasts and websites are still available for public viewing. It also allows brethren to monitor the Thanksgiving proceedings and even conventions.

International Thanksgiving was emanated abroad, when Bro Daniel Razon came to Singapore on November 13, 2004.

On October 7, 2004, Globecast which is situated in Temasek, made an agreement to carry the TOP channel Direct-to-Home broadcast in North America and Canada.
With the latest innovations, the word of God continued to spread around the globe. It now reached the large audience that allows everyone to hear the pure and true Gospel of God in the bible.


YEAR 2008
The locale is still in Rivervalley, but the hunt of finding the God-given venue of brethrens assemblage remains impervious. A place to gather more than 200 souls every International ThanksGiving and Bible Exposition.

From its cradle, this locale undauntedly delivers services for the brethren and fellowman. With Gods help, committees were established for singing, dancing, broadcasting, propagating and looking after for the welfare of brethren, guest and even to our countryman thru external activities like Bloodletting.

Next to Dubai, brethren of Singapore joined hand to etch another list in our history when the broadcast of Good Morning Kuya goes to Singapore on 29th September – 3rd Oct 2008 transpired. It was maybe a spur-of-the-moment gathering of effort and resources but because of God’s help, MCGI brethren managed to pull off such event, which aims to be always a public service program.

Now, Locale of Singapore continues to increase in numbers and services for the brethren and to our fellow. With God’s help more will come to reality.

This locale will remain hand in hand with the same ideals and vision of our leaders. Bro Daniel and Bro Eli. Global Evangelization of God’s saving power, grace and His Love since the beginning and beyond everlasting.

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About > Mission
WebContent.Content:
About Us

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Believing that one of the most important missions of the members of the Church of God International is to propagate the pure and untarnished Gospel of Christ on earth, the Church has conscientiously and fervently carries this obligation to fellowmen all over the world through the use of mass media and the Internet.

It is fully aware that this effort is geared to convert sinners to believe and glorify God, who is calling His people with determination to serve Him, bringing them in His fold, teaching them righteousness and to make them qualify for life eternal in heaven. (I Corinthians 1:9,2; Ephesians 4:1,10,14; Acts 2:38; Philippians 1:27; I Peter 1:15-16; Ephesians 2:10; I Thessalonians 1:1)

As a member of the Church, one is taught to follow religiously and conscientiously the fundamental doctrines for Christians and righteousness as a way of life, and to be law abiding citizens recognizing the fundamental laws of the land they live in. (Ephesians 2:12-13; Acts 26:18; 14:15; 17:29; Rome 13: 1-7; I Pet. 2:13; Proverb 8:15-16)

The Almighty God, the Father, is believed by its members to be the Creator of the universe, and that Christ Jesus is the Father’s only begotten son, a true and Mighty God, the only savior of mankind and the only way to the Kingdom of God in heaven. (Acts 14:15; I Corinthians 8:5-7; John 14:6, 14:1)

It believes that the Philippines is part of the Gentile nations, which is partakers of the promise—the eternal life—through belief in Christ Jesus and the Gospel. As such, it believe that it is not authorized by God to establish their own Church, but are mere members associated with the same body or Church written in the Gospel by accepting and executing the doctrines written by the Apostles. (Ephesians 3:6; Colossians 1:18; I John 2:25; 1:3-4; I Corinthians 12:27; Psalm 127:1; I Timothy 3:15)

The duty and obligation of the members of the Church to propagate the Gospel of Christ shall be undertaken until the consummation of the ages, for only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind. (Luke 8:1-3; Ephesians. 3:10; II Timothy 3:14-17 )

Due to intricacy issue on entry permit, assigned regular workers alternately move in and out every three months. Bro. Fred Lao, Bro. Mark Barroga, Bro. Juan Ferreria, Bro. Jun Gundayao, Bro. Ramil Ramal, and Bro. Mel Lingat were some of the workers who came in to do their duty.

However, those difficulties never deterred on their evangelical mission. On October 12, 2001, four nurses from Lion's Home for the Elders were baptized. Those pious sisters are Sis Ada, Sis Agnes, Sis Alice and Sis Zeny.  On year 2002, another soul had cheerfully given thanks to the Lord for His unspeakable gifts.

With the exceeding grace of God, Bro Romy and Sis Rebecca were baptized. Also, followed by, Sis Nita, Bro Rene and wife Sis Loreta, Sis Ledda, Bro Hector, and Sis Eugene on July of the same year.

In February of 2003, Sis Ruth Soriano remotely conducted the first English-indoctrination via the internet to our Singaporean Brother William.

LOCALE - AS IT GROWS…
On December 2001, the locale was transferred to a bigger location at Choa Chu Kang. Prayer meeting had been set every 8:00pm of Wednesday evening, whereas, Worship Service and Thanksgiving were scheduled every Sunday at 9:30 in the morning. Despite being far from the city, the remoteness did not deter an inch for brethren to congregate and attend the church services. To the brethren’s surprise, Bro Daniel Razon’s first-visit to brethren in Singapore also took place in this malay-owned-residential-unit. The same locale where the first Thanksgiving via a phone-hook-up in Apalit came to a reality. It was then followed by the First Bible Exposition in Cuppage Plaza wherein bro Eli, for the first, answered all the questions in English over the entire bible exposition, via phone-patched.

With God’s mercy and help, the number of brethren continuously grows. The locale transferred again to a new location at #9 Saint Thomas Walk. This semi-province-type walk-up unit in the midst of posh River Valley road had been, once again a fruitful place for God’s calling. During the height of Grand Worldwide Bible Exposition, Singapore was always on the list for those that participated in this Global Event.

Two years passed, locale was once again relocated on a two-storey apartment behind the newly constructed North-East MRT line in Potong Pasir at #33 Pheng Geck Avenue. During that time, there were approximately 30 souls registered. This locale may had not surpassed the number of baptized souls relative to previous venues of services, but in this semi-detached unit, gave birth the many “First” that Locale of Singapore had experienced beyond hoped for. Remember the first part of Thanksgiving emanated abroad by our “Kuya”? Beyond our prayers, God showered His blessings when our next-day bible exposition caused tearful-ovation when Bro Eli himself meekly walked his way towards the stage to introduce himself to an audience of foreign land. A jubilation indeed but did not hastily end because right after that day,  the first run of Bible Expo carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America. Maybe, not so much of a first, but those were all further than wished and dreamt as members.

After several years, brethren from other country travel here in Singapore to work and to find a greener pasture. Then, locale move to a place on where brethren can extend their mission. It is now situated at River Valley which is in the central part of Singapore.
 

HEAR THE GOOD NEWS
With its mission to propagate the true gospel of Christ based on the bible, the first Bible Exposition was held on July 13, 2002. This three-hour English format event, hosted by the only sensible evangelist in our times, had given chance to those people who zealously seeking the true Church written in the bible. This also intensified people's knowledge about the truth in the bible. During the event, people heard and witnessed how Brother Eli indomitably answered the questions of our truth-deprived fellowmen.

On November 14, 2002, the Grand Bible Exposition was then became a much awaited big event during that time in Singapore. The venue of it is at YWCA. Expectedly, all questions have been answered based on the bible.

Another awe-inspiring event happens when locale of Singapore hosted a”Grand Pulong”  in Qatar and Isabela and was aired in the Philippines on November 15, 2004. The event was concurrently happen with the test broadcast of Globecast to North America and Canada.
 

REGISTERED RELIGIOUS SOCIETY IN SINGAPORE
On April 10 2002, Singapore government approved the application and registered the group as a religious society under the name Members of Church of God in Christ Jesus, Pillar and Ground of truth, Singapore. Bro Aga Caacbay and Bro Jun Gundayao went to Singapore on January 2, 2005, to further assist brethren and guests, and to propagate the Word of God written in the Bible. After several months, work permit was given on them to perform as worker and preacher.
 

ADVANCEMENT
Church of God in Singapore signed an agreement and made a tie up with Expan on August 8, 2003, under Asia's number one telecommunication company, SINGTEL. This is to install an Internet Server in Singapore to receive and distribute broadcasts coming from the Apalit, Philippines. Up to date, live and taped broadcasts and websites are still available for public viewing. It also allows brethren to monitor the Thanksgiving proceedings and even conventions.

International Thanksgiving was emanated abroad, when Bro Daniel Razon came to Singapore on November 13, 2004.

On October 7, 2004, Globecast which is situated in Temasek, made an agreement to carry the TOP channel Direct-to-Home broadcast in North America and Canada.
With the latest innovations, the word of God continued to spread around the globe. It now reached the large audience that allows everyone to hear the pure and true Gospel of God in the bible.


YEAR 2008
The locale is still in Rivervalley, but the hunt of finding the God-given venue of brethrens assemblage remains impervious. A place to gather more than 200 souls every International ThanksGiving and Bible Exposition.

From its cradle, this locale undauntedly delivers services for the brethren and fellowman. With Gods help, committees were established for singing, dancing, broadcasting, propagating and looking after for the welfare of brethren, guest and even to our countryman thru external activities like Bloodletting.

Next to Dubai, brethren of Singapore joined hand to etch another list in our history when the broadcast of Good Morning Kuya goes to Singapore on 29th September – 3rd Oct 2008 transpired. It was maybe a spur-of-the-moment gathering of effort and resources but because of God’s help, MCGI brethren managed to pull off such event, which aims to be always a public service program.

Now, Locale of Singapore continues to increase in numbers and services for the brethren and to our fellow. With God’s help more will come to reality.

This locale will remain hand in hand with the same ideals and vision of our leaders. Bro Daniel and Bro Eli. Global Evangelization of God’s saving power, grace and His Love since the beginning and beyond everlasting.

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About > Mission
WebContent.Content:
About Us

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Believing that one of the most important missions of the members of the Church of God International is to propagate the pure and untarnished Gospel of Christ on earth, the Church has conscientiously and fervently carries this obligation to fellowmen all over the world through the use of mass media and the Internet.

It is fully aware that this effort is geared to convert sinners to believe and glorify God, who is calling His people with determination to serve Him, bringing them in His fold, teaching them righteousness and to make them qualify for life eternal in heaven. (I Corinthians 1:9,2; Ephesians 4:1,10,14; Acts 2:38; Philippians 1:27; I Peter 1:15-16; Ephesians 2:10; I Thessalonians 1:1)

As a member of the Church, one is taught to follow religiously and conscientiously the fundamental doctrines for Christians and righteousness as a way of life, and to be law abiding citizens recognizing the fundamental laws of the land they live in. (Ephesians 2:12-13; Acts 26:18; 14:15; 17:29; Rome 13: 1-7; I Pet. 2:13; Proverb 8:15-16)

The Almighty God, the Father, is believed by its members to be the Creator of the universe, and that Christ Jesus is the Father’s only begotten son, a true and Mighty God, the only savior of mankind and the only way to the Kingdom of God in heaven. (Acts 14:15; I Corinthians 8:5-7; John 14:6, 14:1)

It believes that the Philippines is part of the Gentile nations, which is partakers of the promise—the eternal life—through belief in Christ Jesus and the Gospel. As such, it believe that it is not authorized by God to establish their own Church, but are mere members associated with the same body or Church written in the Gospel by accepting and executing the doctrines written by the Apostles. (Ephesians 3:6; Colossians 1:18; I John 2:25; 1:3-4; I Corinthians 12:27; Psalm 127:1; I Timothy 3:15)

The duty and obligation of the members of the Church to propagate the Gospel of Christ shall be undertaken until the consummation of the ages, for only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind. (Luke 8:1-3; Ephesians. 3:10; II Timothy 3:14-17 )

WebContent.Title: Home Content - A Reciprocation...
WebContent.Content:
A Reciprocation of GOD’S Love!

Priscilla Mendoza - November 8, 2009
Once again Members of the Church of God International (MCGI, SG) in the locale of Singapore got together to render gratitude to God for His never ending love. Evidently, the locale of Singapore has grown bigger and this time more people were ascertained to have offered thanksgiving to God. The growing locale had long waited the generation of this opportunity to reciprocate God’s loving kindness. In just a few months, more groups were added to the locale. The total number of established groups is 8 with approximately 20-24 members each. The existing groups of the Singapore locale are as follows: Green, Blue, Pink, Beige, Lavender, Orange, Yellow, and Grey. Each group videotaped at different interesting locations in Singapore. The Lavender Group, for one, recorded its location shooting at the Esplanade where the group almost perfectly executed its performance with God` s help. Even if the number of people who thanked God has dramatically increased, the cooperation of every member including the cameramen dispensed to each group whose efforts seemed errorless.

Other places depicted as part of the presentation were the world renowned Sentosa Island Resort where one can experience an overview of the underwater world. This was the choice of the Yellow group. The beautiful and very oriental Chinese Garden was for the Gray Group, and so on. Apparently, all groups performed joyfully to give praise to our Almighty God.

read more...

WebContent.Title: MCGI Singapore: About
WebContent.Content:
About Us

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Known to be highly principled and incomparable in upholding God's righteousness, the Church, formerly known as the CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF THE TRUTH is now known as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL. The late Nicolas Antiporda Perez, Ka Perez, was the first leader of this group.

When Nicolas Perez died in 1975, Eliseo Soriano Y Fernando pacified a group of believers whose spirits were dampened by the unexpected death of their leader. Although there existed no appointed official successor, Eliseo Soriano nurtured the flock and kept it intact. He taught them that the death of leader does not mean the disintegration of the church. Driven by extreme greed for power, his former colleagues embarked on dark schemes against him and launched an underground plot to malign and discredit Eliseo Soriano before the members.

Seeing this, Eliseo Soriano, together with a few hundred, immediately left the group. In 1980, they registered as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF TRUTH, PHILIPPINES, appointing Eliseo Soriano as Presiding Minister. With this development, a prophecy in the Book of Zachariah was realized (Zach. 13:8-9). While the organization headed by Eliseo Soriano progressed and grew, the other two organizations diminished in number, with vague and obscure doctrines.

Among the three groups, Eliseo Soriano's group became known for upholding the “former” things—of the things in the past. It became known for rendering obedience to God in the same way the first of God's people obeyed Him truthfully. The attributes of the real city of God continued to live in this organization: firm in its stand and fearless in upholding the truth. This group continues to propagate God's teachings worldwide – despite the negative concerted efforts and harassment from its religious foes and the government.

In the eyes of men and God, this group remains to bear a seal, a seal that is impressed in the hearts and minds of the people. In these last days, there remains an organization that is worthy of the people's trust—an organization better known as “THE OLD PATH.”

WebContent.Title: Activities
WebContent.Content:
The Amazing Race….. Let’s play-play lah!!

Posted in Activities on September 21, 2009 by KKTK Sg

“For bodily exercise profiteth little: but godliness is profitable unto all things, having promise of the life that now is, and of that which is to come.” – 1 Tim. 4:8

See the teaser,

They were amazingly fast….

Amazingly smart and amazingly competitive

But there will be only

One Amazing Winner…….

Monday Sept 21, 2009.

The Race starts from Locale of Henderson.

First, the teams were formed according to their abilities,

1st task was…

The battle for LUGAW!! – Using one tool – Chopsticks

With only 10 Dollar coins each,

The teams must run to REDHILL MRT for the next clue.

Of course don’t forget the task.

The teams crumbled under pressure and tension began to

Rise between teams

The teams arrived at Clarke Quay

They needed to choose either Coca or Cola.

Where Coca is to balance books on their heads as they cross the bridge While Cola – to dance like wonder girls

It’s tough

It’s challenging

Strict Facilitators on all locations are waiting

On the way to Stamford’s statue some teams were lost…

Team must ask any Indian, to translate the “AMAZING RACE” into their local language and of course don’t forget to have a picture with them.

In the other hand, they also needed to take picture touching the head of the statue.

Clues, Math Equations, History

Maybe a stumbling block to them.

Next location is to the King with a body of a Fish.

Of Course, it’s the Merlion.

Questions were tricky but the teams managed to handle it.

Next Stop is in BEDOK MRT Station

They needed to count the stations to get the exact location. They are also required to know where the east and west of the MRT station is.  Else, team will be lost…

In BEDOK MRT station, the team will be given a question to go to the next location.

Tension builds up

As the first three teams rode on the same bus.

for the final task and final destination, they  must go to EAST COAST

a team member should drink raw egg to receive a bicycle and advance to the final challenge.

Unfortunately, because of  heavy rain  other teams arrived late

Lunch is too late for them

But the tasks were not finished yet

Lastly,

Final two teams striving for a goal.

One Amazing day and only

One Amazing Team to

Receive One Amazing Cheque

The Amazing Race….. Let’s play-play lah!!

Posted in Activities on September 21, 2009 by KKTK Sg

“For bodily exercise profiteth little: but godliness is profitable unto all things, having promise of the life that now is, and of that which is to come.” – 1 Tim. 4:8

See the teaser,

They were amazingly fast….

Amazingly smart and amazingly competitive

But there will be only

One Amazing Winner…….

Monday Sept 21, 2009.

The Race starts from Locale of Henderson.

First, the teams were formed according to their abilities,

1st task was…

The battle for LUGAW!! – Using one tool – Chopsticks

With only 10 Dollar coins each,

The teams must run to REDHILL MRT for the next clue.

Of course don’t forget the task.

The teams crumbled under pressure and tension began to

Rise between teams

The teams arrived at Clarke Quay

They needed to choose either Coca or Cola.

Where Coca is to balance books on their heads as they cross the bridge While Cola – to dance like wonder girls

It’s tough

It’s challenging

Strict Facilitators on all locations are waiting

On the way to Stamford’s statue some teams were lost…

Team must ask any Indian, to translate the “AMAZING RACE” into their local language and of course don’t forget to have a picture with them.

In the other hand, they also needed to take picture touching the head of the statue.

Clues, Math Equations, History

Maybe a stumbling block to them.

Next location is to the King with a body of a Fish.

Of Course, it’s the Merlion.

Questions were tricky but the teams managed to handle it.

Next Stop is in BEDOK MRT Station

They needed to count the stations to get the exact location. They are also required to know where the east and west of the MRT station is.  Else, team will be lost…

In BEDOK MRT station, the team will be given a question to go to the next location.

Tension builds up

As the first three teams rode on the same bus.

for the final task and final destination, they  must go to EAST COAST

a team member should drink raw egg to receive a bicycle and advance to the final challenge.

Unfortunately, because of  heavy rain  other teams arrived late

Lunch is too late for them

But the tasks were not finished yet

Lastly,

Final two teams striving for a goal.

One Amazing day and only

One Amazing Team to

Receive One Amazing Cheque

Leave A Comment »

Home
WebContent.Content:
A Reciprocation of GOD’S Love!

Priscilla Mendoza- November 8, 2008 

Once again Members of the Church of God International (MCGI, SG) in the locale of Singapore got together to render gratitude to God for His never ending love. Evidently, the locale of Singapore has grown bigger and this time more people were ascertained to have offered thanksgiving to God. The growing locale had long waited the generation of this opportunity to reciprocate God’s loving kindness. In just a few months, more groups were added to the locale. The total number of established groups is 8 with approximately 20-24 members each. The existing groups of the Singapore locale are as follows:  Green, Blue, Pink, Beige, Lavender, Orange, Yellow, and Grey. Each group videotaped at different interesting locations in Singapore. The Lavender Group, for one, recorded its location shooting at the Esplanade where the group almost perfectly executed its performance with God` s help. Even if the number of people who thanked God has dramatically increased, the cooperation of every member including the cameramen dispensed to each group whose efforts seemed errorless.

Other places depicted as part of the presentation were the world renowned Sentosa Island
Resort where one can experience an overview of the underwater world. This was the choice of the Yellow group. The beautiful and very oriental Chinese Garden was for the Gray Group, and so on. Apparently, all groups performed joyfully to give praise to our Almighty God.

read more

WebContent.Title: About
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Known to be highly principled and incomparable in upholding God's righteousness, the Church, formerly known as the CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF THE TRUTH is now known as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL. The late Nicolas Antiporda Perez, Ka Perez, was the first leader of this group.

When Nicolas Perez died in 1975, Eliseo Soriano Y Fernando pacified a group of believers whose spirits were dampened by the unexpected death of their leader. Although there existed no appointed official successor, Eliseo Soriano nurtured the flock and kept it intact. He taught them that the death of leader does not mean the disintegration of the church. Driven by extreme greed for power, his former colleagues embarked on dark schemes against him and launched an underground plot to malign and discredit Eliseo Soriano before the members.

Seeing this, Eliseo Soriano, together with a few hundred, immediately left the group. In 1980, they registered as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF TRUTH, PHILIPPINES, appointing Eliseo Soriano as Presiding Minister. With this development, a prophecy in the Book of Zachariah was realized (Zach. 13:8-9). While the organization headed by Eliseo Soriano progressed and grew, the other two organizations diminished in number, with vague and obscure doctrines.

Among the three groups, Eliseo Soriano's group became known for upholding the “former” things—of the things in the past. It became known for rendering obedience to God in the same way the first of God's people obeyed Him truthfully. The attributes of the real city of God continued to live in this organization: firm in its stand and fearless in upholding the truth. This group continues to propagate God's teachings worldwide – despite the negative concerted efforts and harassment from its religious foes and the government.

In the eyes of men and God, this group remains to bear a seal, a seal that is impressed in the hearts and minds of the people. In these last days, there remains an organization that is worthy of the people's trust—an organization better known as “THE OLD PATH.”

WebContent.Title: Mission
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Believing that one of the most important missions of the members of the Church of God International is to propagate the pure and untarnished Gospel of Christ on earth, the Church has conscientiously and fervently carries this obligation to fellowmen all over the world through the use of mass media and the Internet.

It is fully aware that this effort is geared to convert sinners to believe and glorify God, who is calling His people with determination to serve Him, bringing them in His fold, teaching them righteousness and to make them qualify for life eternal in heaven. (I Corinthians 1:9,2; Ephesians 4:1,10,14; Acts 2:38; Philippians 1:27; I Peter 1:15-16; Ephesians 2:10; I Thessalonians 1:1)

As a member of the Church, one is taught to follow religiously and conscientiously the fundamental doctrines for Christians and righteousness as a way of life, and to be law abiding citizens recognizing the fundamental laws of the land they live in. (Ephesians 2:12-13; Acts 26:18; 14:15; 17:29; Rome 13: 1-7; I Pet. 2:13; Proverb 8:15-16)

The Almighty God, the Father, is believed by its members to be the Creator of the universe, and that Christ Jesus is the Father’s only begotten son, a true and Mighty God, the only savior of mankind and the only way to the Kingdom of God in heaven. (Acts 14:15; I Corinthians 8:5-7; John 14:6, 14:1)

It believes that the Philippines is part of the Gentile nations, which is partakers of the promise—the eternal life—through belief in Christ Jesus and the Gospel. As such, it believe that it is not authorized by God to establish their own Church, but are mere members associated with the same body or Church written in the Gospel by accepting and executing the doctrines written by the Apostles. (Ephesians 3:6; Colossians 1:18; I John 2:25; 1:3-4; I Corinthians 12:27; Psalm 127:1; I Timothy 3:15)

The duty and obligation of the members of the Church to propagate the Gospel of Christ shall be undertaken until the consummation of the ages, for only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind. (Luke 8:1-3; Ephesians. 3:10; II Timothy 3:14-17 )

WebContent.Title: History
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

FIRST WORSHIP SERVICE
On December 16, 2000, the Members of the Church of God in Christ Jesus, the Pillar and Ground of the Truth (Now, registered as “Members Church of God International” in the Phillipines), in Singapore held its first Worship Service at Commonwealth (near MRT station).

This foreign chapter was commenced by four brethrens- Bro. John Alcaras and his wife Sis Agnes Alcaras, Bro. Noli Falcis, and Sis Mary Jo Maleriado.

During that time, the assemblage was held in Bro. John's residence with the use of transcription for the Prayer Meeting and Worship Service. Thanksgiving were monitored thru cassette tapes and VHS. But even before the first church service was on its inception, bible study then was conducted by sis Mary Jo to bro Rex Fonacier  and his housemates, who was not a member then. That became a channel to spread the word of God in this City State.

FRUIT OF PROPAGATION
With the resolute effort exerted by every member with the help of God in this locale, six souls underwent indoctrination on June 2001. They all started watching the Church's program (Ang Dating Daan or The Old Path) in SBN 21, until they found themselves lightheartedly attending the indoctrination via VHS tape. Fruitfully, before nightfall of July 26, 2001, first membership took place. It was Bro Resty Reyes, on OIC then who baptized the first batch of harvested-soul. Bro Rex was part of this first set and to name a few are Bro Cesar Dacigo, Sis Yang Valdez and Bro Rene Barnido.

To further support brethren and visitors, workers were sent. Bro Melvin Arbo followed by Bro Mel Lingat move in to Singapore. They conducted live indoctrinations and Bible study. Due to intricacy issue on entry permit, assigned regular workers alternately move in and out every three months. Bro. Fred Lao, Bro. Mark Barroga, Bro. Juan Ferreria, Bro. Jun Gundayao, Bro. Ramil Ramal, and Bro. Mel Lingat were some of the workers who came in to do their duty.

However, those difficulties never deterred on their evangelical mission. On October 12, 2001, four nurses from Lion's Home for the Elders were baptized. Those pious sisters are Sis Ada, Sis Agnes, Sis Alice and Sis Zeny.  On year 2002, another soul had cheerfully given thanks to the Lord for His unspeakable gifts.

With the exceeding grace of God, Bro Romy and Sis Rebecca were baptized. Also, followed by, Sis Nita, Bro Rene and wife Sis Loreta, Sis Ledda, Bro Hector, and Sis Eugene on July of the same year.

In February of 2003, Sis Ruth Soriano remotely conducted the first English-indoctrination via the internet to our Singaporean Brother William.

LOCALE - AS IT GROWS…
On December 2001, the locale was transferred to a bigger location at Choa Chu Kang. Prayer meeting had been set every 8:00pm of Wednesday evening, whereas, Worship Service and Thanksgiving were scheduled every Sunday at 9:30 in the morning. Despite being far from the city, the remoteness did not deter an inch for brethren to congregate and attend the church services. To the brethren’s surprise, Bro Daniel Razon’s first-visit to brethren in Singapore also took place in this malay-owned-residential-unit. The same locale where the first Thanksgiving via a phone-hook-up in Apalit came to a reality. It was then followed by the First Bible Exposition in Cuppage Plaza wherein bro Eli, for the first, answered all the questions in English over the entire bible exposition, via phone-patched.

With God’s mercy and help, the number of brethren continuously grows. The locale transferred again to a new location at #9 Saint Thomas Walk. This semi-province-type walk-up unit in the midst of posh River Valley road had been, once again a fruitful place for God’s calling. During the height of Grand Worldwide Bible Exposition, Singapore was always on the list for those that participated in this Global Event.

Two years passed, locale was once again relocated on a two-storey apartment behind the newly constructed North-East MRT line in Potong Pasir at #33 Pheng Geck Avenue. During that time, there were approximately 30 souls registered. This locale may had not surpassed the number of baptized souls relative to previous venues of services, but in this semi-detached unit, gave birth the many “First” that Locale of Singapore had experienced beyond hoped for. Remember the first part of Thanksgiving emanated abroad by our “Kuya”? Beyond our prayers, God showered His blessings when our next-day bible exposition caused tearful-ovation when Bro Eli himself meekly walked his way towards the stage to introduce himself to an audience of foreign land. A jubilation indeed but did not hastily end because right after that day,  the first run of Bible Expo carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America. Maybe, not so much of a first, but those were all further than wished and dreamt as members.

After several years, brethren from other country travel here in Singapore to work and to find a greener pasture. Then, locale move to a place on where brethren can extend their mission. It is now situated at River Valley which is in the central part of Singapore.
 

HEAR THE GOOD NEWS
With its mission to propagate the true gospel of Christ based on the bible, the first Bible Exposition was held on July 13, 2002. This three-hour English format event, hosted by the only sensible evangelist in our times, had given chance to those people who zealously seeking the true Church written in the bible. This also intensified people's knowledge about the truth in the bible. During the event, people heard and witnessed how Brother Eli indomitably answered the questions of our truth-deprived fellowmen.

On November 14, 2002, the Grand Bible Exposition was then became a much awaited big event during that time in Singapore. The venue of it is at YWCA. Expectedly, all questions have been answered based on the bible.

Another awe-inspiring event happens when locale of Singapore hosted a”Grand Pulong”  in Qatar and Isabela and was aired in the Philippines on November 15, 2004. The event was concurrently happen with the test broadcast of Globecast to North America and Canada.
 

REGISTERED RELIGIOUS SOCIETY IN SINGAPORE
On April 10 2002, Singapore government approved the application and registered the group as a religious society under the name Members of Church of God in Christ Jesus, Pillar and Ground of truth, Singapore. Bro Aga Caacbay and Bro Jun Gundayao went to Singapore on January 2, 2005, to further assist brethren and guests, and to propagate the Word of God written in the Bible. After several months, work permit was given on them to perform as worker and preacher.
 

ADVANCEMENT
Church of God in Singapore signed an agreement and made a tie up with Expan on August 8, 2003, under Asia's number one telecommunication company, SINGTEL. This is to install an Internet Server in Singapore to receive and distribute broadcasts coming from the Apalit, Philippines. Up to date, live and taped broadcasts and websites are still available for public viewing. It also allows brethren to monitor the Thanksgiving proceedings and even conventions.

International Thanksgiving was emanated abroad, when Bro Daniel Razon came to Singapore on November 13, 2004.

On October 7, 2004, Globecast which is situated in Temasek, made an agreement to carry the TOP channel Direct-to-Home broadcast in North America and Canada.
With the latest innovations, the word of God continued to spread around the globe. It now reached the large audience that allows everyone to hear the pure and true Gospel of God in the bible.


YEAR 2008
The locale is still in Rivervalley, but the hunt of finding the God-given venue of brethrens assemblage remains impervious. A place to gather more than 200 souls every International ThanksGiving and Bible Exposition.

From its cradle, this locale undauntedly delivers services for the brethren and fellowman. With Gods help, committees were established for singing, dancing, broadcasting, propagating and looking after for the welfare of brethren, guest and even to our countryman thru external activities like Bloodletting.

Next to Dubai, brethren of Singapore joined hand to etch another list in our history when the broadcast of Good Morning Kuya goes to Singapore on 29th September – 3rd Oct 2008 transpired. It was maybe a spur-of-the-moment gathering of effort and resources but because of God’s help, MCGI brethren managed to pull off such event, which aims to be always a public service program.

Now, Locale of Singapore continues to increase in numbers and services for the brethren and to our fellow. With God’s help more will come to reality.

This locale will remain hand in hand with the same ideals and vision of our leaders. Bro Daniel and Bro Eli. Global Evangelization of God’s saving power, grace and His Love since the beginning and beyond everlasting.

WebContent.Title: Image Banner
Image Banner (Public)
About
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Known to be highly principled and incomparable in upholding God's righteousness, the Church, formerly known as the CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF THE TRUTH is now known as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD INTERNATIONAL. The late Nicolas Antiporda Perez, Ka Perez, was the first leader of this group.

When Nicolas Perez died in 1975, Eliseo Soriano Y Fernando pacified a group of believers whose spirits were dampened by the unexpected death of their leader. Although there existed no appointed official successor, Eliseo Soriano nurtured the flock and kept it intact. He taught them that the death of leader does not mean the disintegration of the church. Driven by extreme greed for power, his former colleagues embarked on dark schemes against him and launched an underground plot to malign and discredit Eliseo Soriano before the members.

Seeing this, Eliseo Soriano, together with a few hundred, immediately left the group. In 1980, they registered as MEMBERS OF THE CHURCH OF GOD IN CHRIST JESUS, PILLAR AND GROUND OF TRUTH, PHILIPPINES, appointing Eliseo Soriano as Presiding Minister. With this development, a prophecy in the Book of Zachariah was realized (Zach. 13:8-9). While the organization headed by Eliseo Soriano progressed and grew, the other two organizations diminished in number, with vague and obscure doctrines.

Among the three groups, Eliseo Soriano's group became known for upholding the “former” things—of the things in the past. It became known for rendering obedience to God in the same way the first of God's people obeyed Him truthfully. The attributes of the real city of God continued to live in this organization: firm in its stand and fearless in upholding the truth. This group continues to propagate God's teachings worldwide – despite the negative concerted efforts and harassment from its religious foes and the government.

In the eyes of men and God, this group remains to bear a seal, a seal that is impressed in the hearts and minds of the people. In these last days, there remains an organization that is worthy of the people's trust—an organization better known as “THE OLD PATH.”

WebContent.Title: Mission
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

Believing that one of the most important missions of the members of the Church of God International is to propagate the pure and untarnished Gospel of Christ on earth, the Church has conscientiously and fervently carries this obligation to fellowmen all over the world through the use of mass media and the Internet.

It is fully aware that this effort is geared to convert sinners to believe and glorify God, who is calling His people with determination to serve Him, bringing them in His fold, teaching them righteousness and to make them qualify for life eternal in heaven. (I Corinthians 1:9,2; Ephesians 4:1,10,14; Acts 2:38; Philippians 1:27; I Peter 1:15-16; Ephesians 2:10; I Thessalonians 1:1)

As a member of the Church, one is taught to follow religiously and conscientiously the fundamental doctrines for Christians and righteousness as a way of life, and to be law abiding citizens recognizing the fundamental laws of the land they live in. (Ephesians 2:12-13; Acts 26:18; 14:15; 17:29; Rome 13: 1-7; I Pet. 2:13; Proverb 8:15-16)

The Almighty God, the Father, is believed by its members to be the Creator of the universe, and that Christ Jesus is the Father’s only begotten son, a true and Mighty God, the only savior of mankind and the only way to the Kingdom of God in heaven. (Acts 14:15; I Corinthians 8:5-7; John 14:6, 14:1)

It believes that the Philippines is part of the Gentile nations, which is partakers of the promise—the eternal life—through belief in Christ Jesus and the Gospel. As such, it believe that it is not authorized by God to establish their own Church, but are mere members associated with the same body or Church written in the Gospel by accepting and executing the doctrines written by the Apostles. (Ephesians 3:6; Colossians 1:18; I John 2:25; 1:3-4; I Corinthians 12:27; Psalm 127:1; I Timothy 3:15)

The duty and obligation of the members of the Church to propagate the Gospel of Christ shall be undertaken until the consummation of the ages, for only the Church can teach the wisdom of God for the salvation of mankind. (Luke 8:1-3; Ephesians. 3:10; II Timothy 3:14-17 )

WebContent.Title: History
WebContent.Content:
About

Locale History | Mission & Discipline | Publications

FIRST WORSHIP SERVICE
On December 16, 2000, the Members of the Church of God in Christ Jesus, the Pillar and Ground of the Truth (Now, registered as “Members Church of God International” in the Phillipines), in Singapore held its first Worship Service at Commonwealth (near MRT station).

This foreign chapter was commenced by four brethrens- Bro. John Alcaras and his wife Sis Agnes Alcaras, Bro. Noli Falcis, and Sis Mary Jo Maleriado.

During that time, the assemblage was held in Bro. John's residence with the use of transcription for the Prayer Meeting and Worship Service. Thanksgiving were monitored thru cassette tapes and VHS. But even before the first church service was on its inception, bible study then was conducted by sis Mary Jo to bro Rex Fonacier  and his housemates, who was not a member then. That became a channel to spread the word of God in this City State.

FRUIT OF PROPAGATION
With the resolute effort exerted by every member with the help of God in this locale, six souls underwent indoctrination on June 2001. They all started watching the Church's program (Ang Dating Daan or The Old Path) in SBN 21, until they found themselves lightheartedly attending the indoctrination via VHS tape. Fruitfully, before nightfall of July 26, 2001, first membership took place. It was Bro Resty Reyes, on OIC then who baptized the first batch of harvested-soul. Bro Rex was part of this first set and to name a few are Bro Cesar Dacigo, Sis Yang Valdez and Bro Rene Barnido.

To further support brethren and visitors, workers were sent. Bro Melvin Arbo followed by Bro Mel Lingat move in to Singapore. They conducted live indoctrinations and Bible study. Due to intricacy issue on entry permit, assigned regular workers alternately move in and out every three months. Bro. Fred Lao, Bro. Mark Barroga, Bro. Juan Ferreria, Bro. Jun Gundayao, Bro. Ramil Ramal, and Bro. Mel Lingat were some of the workers who came in to do their duty.

However, those difficulties never deterred on their evangelical mission. On October 12, 2001, four nurses from Lion's Home for the Elders were baptized. Those pious sisters are Sis Ada, Sis Agnes, Sis Alice and Sis Zeny.  On year 2002, another soul had cheerfully given thanks to the Lord for His unspeakable gifts.

With the exceeding grace of God, Bro Romy and Sis Rebecca were baptized. Also, followed by, Sis Nita, Bro Rene and wife Sis Loreta, Sis Ledda, Bro Hector, and Sis Eugene on July of the same year.

In February of 2003, Sis Ruth Soriano remotely conducted the first English-indoctrination via the internet to our Singaporean Brother William.

LOCALE - AS IT GROWS…
On December 2001, the locale was transferred to a bigger location at Choa Chu Kang. Prayer meeting had been set every 8:00pm of Wednesday evening, whereas, Worship Service and Thanksgiving were scheduled every Sunday at 9:30 in the morning. Despite being far from the city, the remoteness did not deter an inch for brethren to congregate and attend the church services. To the brethren’s surprise, Bro Daniel Razon’s first-visit to brethren in Singapore also took place in this malay-owned-residential-unit. The same locale where the first Thanksgiving via a phone-hook-up in Apalit came to a reality. It was then followed by the First Bible Exposition in Cuppage Plaza wherein bro Eli, for the first, answered all the questions in English over the entire bible exposition, via phone-patched.

With God’s mercy and help, the number of brethren continuously grows. The locale transferred again to a new location at #9 Saint Thomas Walk. This semi-province-type walk-up unit in the midst of posh River Valley road had been, once again a fruitful place for God’s calling. During the height of Grand Worldwide Bible Exposition, Singapore was always on the list for those that participated in this Global Event.

Two years passed, locale was once again relocated on a two-storey apartment behind the newly constructed North-East MRT line in Potong Pasir at #33 Pheng Geck Avenue. During that time, there were approximately 30 souls registered. This locale may had not surpassed the number of baptized souls relative to previous venues of services, but in this semi-detached unit, gave birth the many “First” that Locale of Singapore had experienced beyond hoped for. Remember the first part of Thanksgiving emanated abroad by our “Kuya”? Beyond our prayers, God showered His blessings when our next-day bible exposition caused tearful-ovation when Bro Eli himself meekly walked his way towards the stage to introduce himself to an audience of foreign land. A jubilation indeed but did not hastily end because right after that day,  the first run of Bible Expo carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America. Maybe, not so much of a first, but those were all further than wished and dreamt as members.

After several years, brethren from other country travel here in Singapore to work and to find a greener pasture. Then, locale move to a place on where brethren can extend their mission. It is now situated at River Valley which is in the central part of Singapore.
 

HEAR THE GOOD NEWS
With its mission to propagate the true gospel of Christ based on the bible, the first Bible Exposition was held on July 13, 2002. This three-hour English format event, hosted by the only sensible evangelist in our times, had given chance to those people who zealously seeking the true Church written in the bible. This also intensified people's knowledge about the truth in the bible. During the event, people heard and witnessed how Brother Eli indomitably answered the questions of our truth-deprived fellowmen.

On November 14, 2002, the Grand Bible Exposition was then became a much awaited big event during that time in Singapore. The venue of it is at YWCA. Expectedly, all questions have been answered based on the bible.

Another awe-inspiring event happens when locale of Singapore hosted a”Grand Pulong”  in Qatar and Isabela and was aired in the Philippines on November 15, 2004. The event was concurrently happen with the test broadcast of Globecast to North America and Canada.
 

REGISTERED RELIGIOUS SOCIETY IN SINGAPORE
On April 10 2002, Singapore government approved the application and registered the group as a religious society under the name Members of Church of God in Christ Jesus, Pillar and Ground of truth, Singapore. Bro Aga Caacbay and Bro Jun Gundayao went to Singapore on January 2, 2005, to further assist brethren and guests, and to propagate the Word of God written in the Bible. After several months, work permit was given on them to perform as worker and preacher.
 

ADVANCEMENT
Church of God in Singapore signed an agreement and made a tie up with Expan on August 8, 2003, under Asia's number one telecommunication company, SINGTEL. This is to install an Internet Server in Singapore to receive and distribute broadcasts coming from the Apalit, Philippines. Up to date, live and taped broadcasts and websites are still available for public viewing. It also allows brethren to monitor the Thanksgiving proceedings and even conventions.

International Thanksgiving was emanated abroad, when Bro Daniel Razon came to Singapore on November 13, 2004.

On October 7, 2004, Globecast which is situated in Temasek, made an agreement to carry the TOP channel Direct-to-Home broadcast in North America and Canada.
With the latest innovations, the word of God continued to spread around the globe. It now reached the large audience that allows everyone to hear the pure and true Gospel of God in the bible.


YEAR 2008
The locale is still in Rivervalley, but the hunt of finding the God-given venue of brethrens assemblage remains impervious. A place to gather more than 200 souls every International ThanksGiving and Bible Exposition.

From its cradle, this locale undauntedly delivers services for the brethren and fellowman. With Gods help, committees were established for singing, dancing, broadcasting, propagating and looking after for the welfare of brethren, guest and even to our countryman thru external activities like Bloodletting.

Next to Dubai, brethren of Singapore joined hand to etch another list in our history when the broadcast of Good Morning Kuya goes to Singapore on 29th September – 3rd Oct 2008 transpired. It was maybe a spur-of-the-moment gathering of effort and resources but because of God’s help, MCGI brethren managed to pull off such event, which aims to be always a public service program.

WebContent.Title: About TOC
WebContent.Content:
Oplan Dalaw Kapatid Committe

  • Assigned Workers:  Bro. Jun Gundayao / Bro. Aga Caacbay
  • Assigned Workers:  Bro. Jun Gundayao / Bro. Aga Caacbay
  • Assigned Workers:  Bro. Jun Gundayao / Bro. Aga Caacbay
  • Coordinators: Bro. Arseniel Reyes & Sis. Mary Anne Gonzaga

 

Objectives

  • Its aim is to encourage the newly-baptized and active brethren to hold steadfast in their faith and on the other hand bring back the erring brother or sister with God’s help and mercy 
  • To reach out to the brethren in Singapore through weekly visitations

 

As it was written in...

  • James 5:19-20  “Brethren, if any of you do err from the truth, and one convert him; Let him know, that he which converteth the sinner from the error of his way shall save a soul from death, and shall hide a multitude of sins..”
  • 1 Peter 4:8  “And above all things have fervent love among yourselves: for love shall cover the multitude of sins.”

 

Participants

  • Workers, Trainees, Officers and Group Servants, Choir Members, and other Active Church Members.

 

Schedule Of Weekly Visitations

  • Every Thursdays & Sundays
  • 7:30 PM onwards

 

Activities

  • Started the visitation with congregational singing & prayers being led by the assigned worker.
  • Each visit is never complete without singing, recollections and lot of bonding, which holds us together in love and charity

 

We motivate and invite members to take part in this activity as it is an avenue to develop friendships among brethren and to encourage us also to persevere in faith.

 

1 Cor 14:26 "... Let all things be done for edification."

May Espiritung nararamdaman pag nakikita-kita ang mga magkakapatid. Pag naramdaman mo yung pakiramdam na yun, ingatan mo. 'Wag kang papayag na mapalitan ng iba yang Espiritu na yan.

WebContent.Title: About TOC
WebContent.Content: This is about Thanksgiving Orientation Committee

WebContent.Title: About TOC
WebContent.Content:
Oplan Dalaw Kapatid Committe

  • Assigned Workers:  Bro. Jun Gundayao / Bro. Aga Caacbay
  • Coordinators: Bro. Arseniel Reyes & Sis. Mary Anne Gonzaga

 

Objectives

  • Its aim is to encourage the newly-baptized and active brethren to hold steadfast in their faith and on the other hand bring back the erring brother or sister with God’s help and mercy 
  • To reach out to the brethren in Singapore through weekly visitations

 

As it was written in...

  • James 5:19-20  “Brethren, if any of you do err from the truth, and one convert him; Let him know, that he which converteth the sinner from the error of his way shall save a soul from death, and shall hide a multitude of sins..”
  • 1 Peter 4:8  “And above all things have fervent love among yourselves: for love shall cover the multitude of sins.”

 

Participants

  • Workers, Trainees, Officers and Group Servants, Choir Members, and other Active Church Members.

 

Schedule Of Weekly Visitations

  • Every Thursdays & Sundays
  • 7:30 PM onwards

 

Activities

  • Started the visitation with congregational singing & prayers being led by the assigned worker.
  • Each visit is never complete without singing, recollections and lot of bonding, which holds us together in love and charity

 

We motivate and invite members to take part in this activity as it is an avenue to develop friendships among brethren and to encourage us also to persevere in faith.

 

1 Cor 14:26 "... Let all things be done for edification."

WebContent.Title: The Show
WebContent.Content:
The Show

 

Host City

The "City of Merlion" Singapore is the home of more than 5 million people. Located in South East Asia, it covers a land area of about 710 square kilometres. One of the smallest countries in the world and the smallest in the region, Singapore is called "The Little Red Dot". Though small in size, Singapore plays a big role in the world today with its free trade economy and high-level workforce.

Known as the "melting pot of Asia," Singapore's populace is a diversity of cultures. The four major races inhabiting the country include the majority of Chinese, Malay, Indian and Eurasian. Each race offers a distinct colour in the collage of Singapore's culture, religion, food and language.

This small city has its nostalgic charm, key historical landmarks and memorials that are still standing in the island. A showcase of Singapore's culture is reflected in the busy districts of Kampong Glam, Little India and the ever famous Chinatown. From dusk to dawn, bright city lights entertains tourists from the iconic stretch of Orchard Road as location to gigantic shopping malls to the party roads of Clark Quay.

There are still more to explore is this small city state. Singapore is indeed a picture of a fabulous cityscape that never fails to awe its visitors. Experience and explore this fishing village turned cosmopolitan-city, and your stay will surely be memorable.

Official Tourism Website of Singapore:
http://www.yoursingapore.com

 

Host Locale

On December 16, 2000, the Members of the Church of God in Christ Jesus, the Pillar and Ground of the Truth (now registered as "Members Church of God International") held is first worship service in Commonwealth. From four souls, Locale of Singapore has grown in number to more than 400 brethren and continuously increasing as many people are becoming aware of the preachings of Bro Eli and Bro Daniel.

Locale of Singapore opens its doors to brethren who visit the city for travel, and for brethren who seek greener pasture. To brethren who go abroad, Locale of Singapore is an agreeable place to migrate since it is a notable overseas chapter active in various Church activities like worship services, prayer meetings, thanksgivings and bible expositions.

Locale of Singapore gave birth the many of the Church's "firsts" in its propagation abroad. It is an important chronicle in our Church history that Brother Eli and Brother Daniel's first step outside the Philippines was in this country. The first thanksgiving emanated from abroad was held in the city, followed by the first Bible Exposition carried by Globecast piloted the satellite traversing Asia and America.

It is the first locale in Asia to hold an "A Song Of Praise Music Festival" in 2011. Now, it is another first that Locale of Singapore will host the first ASOP Asia and Oceania Division Finals. All for the glory of our God!

Official MCGISG Website:
http://www.mcgi.org.sg

 

Venue

Located in central district of the island, Locale of Singapore is accessible to public transport. Nearby MRT Stations provide easy access to brethren with Tiong Bahru and Redhill stations on the green line, Telok Blangah on the yellow line, and Harbourfront on yellow/purple access line. Its Main Hall holds about 300-400 persons and fully air-conditioned, very conducive to house the solemnity or festivity of different Church gatherings.
